gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found that migration evidence was prose-only and that production source did not yet have a legacy dependency guard. The PR now includes a closed legacy migration evidence schema/validator, an optional release-bundle artifact role, and a production-source scanner with an empty allowlist; the same reviewer re-checked and approved both fixes.
verification: GPT-5.5 review found two issues; both were fixed and the same reviewer approved the follow-up
what_changed: Added a documented legacy compatibility removal gate for the migration-only restaurant_kv_serving facade.
Added document_kv.legacy_compatibility_migration.v1 evidence validation, a Cachet facade, and an optional legacy_migration_evidence release-bundle role.
Extended governance tests to reject production source dependencies on restaurant_kv_serving outside the legacy compatibility package.
why: Cachet should remain one repository and one distribution package while preserving legacy shims only until downstream Databricks runners and older imports have machine-checkable migration evidence.
